summary: Iteration 6 backend testing: 7/8 tests pass. Fixed ObjectId validation crashes in GET/DELETE /api/coach/conversations/{id} and POST /api/coach/apply-recommendation. One failure: existing DB has hardcoded 'Eric' profile from prior seed — code defaults are correct but old data persists.

critical.issue: Invalid ObjectId (e.g., 'nonexistentid') caused unhandled bson.InvalidId exception → 500. FIXED: Added try/except → returns 422.
Same ObjectId crash as above. FIXED: Added try/except → returns 422.
Same ObjectId crash for invalid conversation_id. FIXED: Added try/except → returns 422.

minor.issue: DB still has old seeded profile with name='Eric', bodyweight=260 and hardcoded PRs from prior iteration seed. Code defaults are correct (name='', bodyweight=0.0). Needs DB reset/migration to clear old seed data.

action_items: Clear old seeded 'Eric' profile data from MongoDB — the profile collection still has hardcoded Eric data with name='Eric', currentBodyweight=260, basePRs with real values. E1 should reset DB or provide a migration to clear old seed data so new blank defaults apply.
ObjectId validation fixes applied in server.py for 3 endpoints — no further action needed for those.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /log/{entry_id} and DELETE /log/{entry_id} also use ObjectId() without try/except — same 500 crash risk for invalid IDs. Recommend fixing those too.
seed_data_creation: None — existing DB had Eric seed data from prior iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 ObjectId crash bugs were fixed in server.py. Remaining issue: MongoDB profile collection has old 'Eric' hardcoded data. E1 needs to clear/reset the DB seed. Also check PUT/DELETE /log/{id} for same ObjectId crash pattern.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: GET/DELETE /api/coach/conversations/{id} and POST /api/coach/apply-recommendation directly called ObjectId(user_input) without catching bson.errors.InvalidId. When given a non-hex string like 'nonexistentid', bson raises InvalidId uncaught → FastAPI returns 500. Fix: wrap in try/except → HTTPException(422). Profile 'Eric' issue: prior seed endpoint inserted hardcoded Eric data; new code defaults to '' but old document persists in MongoDB.
